title: Search Activities! (Call summary, Note and Meetings)

posts.author: Marty01 (Marty)
posts.cookedHtml:
Monday community - please vote on this to get it to the top of the roadmap!!

Search everything feature needs to search across Notes, Call Summary and Log meeting

Being able to search notes I have entered from calls and meetings is the most basic feature that a CRM should have.
Can’t believe that mondayCRM does not have it out of the box!

Please upvote this so the monday team make it happen fast (so I don’t have to switch to Pipedrive)

posts.author: OnRea (On'Rea Knox-Lewis)
posts.cookedHtml: Yes, that would be great, easy way to find specific data, topics,. and dates.

posts.author: Marty01 (Marty)
posts.cookedHtml:
2025-03-28 09_10_13-Clipboard522×713 34.2 KB

This is what needs to be searchable - please vote everyone.

posts.author: karamjittech (Karam)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi @Marty01 – I’m currently working on this and it would be great if we could connect, as that would really help me shape the solution better. Let me know if you’re open to a quick chat!

posts.author: karamjittech (Karam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Update: I’ve built a solution that allows you to efficiently search through Call Summaries, Notes, and Meetings logged in the native Emails & Activities app – exactly what many of us have been waiting for!

  • No more scrolling endlessly or jumping between items – this tool brings powerful, fast search functionality right to your fingertips.

Attaching a quick screenshot below so you can get a feel for it.

I’m currently giving early access to a few folks – if you’re interested in trying it out or want a quick walkthrough, feel free to DM me and I’ll set you up!

11920×1080 112 KB

21920×1080 93.9 KB

31920×1080 78 KB

41920×1080 78.8 KB

– Karam

posts.author: Marty01 (Marty)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello Karam,

We need some help with this, we have installed it but it doesn’t seem to be working?

Ken Simpkin is our internal Monday.com expert – can you please contact him direct? Ken.simpkin@shadesystems.co.nz

Regards

Marty Stewart

posts.author: Ken-S (Ken)
posts.cookedHtml: I am Marty’s IT support. We have installed this and are testing but cant get any results in note and activities in the CRM boards. It doesn’t list any CRM boards in the boards list either. Appreciate your help.

posts.author: karamjittech (Karam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Marty & Ken,

would you mind to record the screenshot and send over asap please. Ill sort this out.

posts.author: karamjittech (Karam)
posts.cookedHtml:
Marty:

Ken.simpkin@shadesystems.co.nz

Sure, thanks. Just messaged him.

posts.author: Ken-S (Ken)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello I tested your app on one of our boards. I created a new note with this text in the note kentestsearch To make sure that I was searching for a unique word that I knew existed within a note in the board that the app is installed on . I started a search for this at three minutes it is still not found the result. I do note that in the list of boards in your app only a fraction of the number of the boards in our system are showing. If I search for a common term such as email it does seem to find this.

posts.author: moorejom (Joshua Moore)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Karam, I’m new to Monday and to the Community site. I can’t PM you, but could we please connect? We would like to use this tool to search summaries, notes, and meetings.
